name: akii-seo-ai-search-optimizer
description: Free SEO + AEO + GEO toolkit by Akii. Aligned with Google's AI Optimization Guide for Google AI Overviews + AI Mode. Audit sites, plan content, optimize pages, generate schema, cluster keywords. Estimates AI visibility for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, and Google AI Overviews via an open-source LLM judge (Llama 4 / DeepSeek) + per-engine public-signal proxy — not direct engine queries (those are an Akii platform feature). Auto-detects Ahrefs, GSC, Apify MCPs for richer data.
